raw.subject: Your Nampa page caught my eye, Cruz N Cutz Barbershop
raw.body:
Hi,

Your Black Angus heritage is a beautiful tribute to the ranch photos you share on your page. It's clear that Cruz N Cutz Barbershop is a labor of love.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and with many customers likely searching online for restaurants in Nampa, it might be leaving some bookings on the table.

I sketched out a page idea that incorporates your menu hero, hours block, and photo gallery to give customers a better sense of what you have to offer. I also included a map & directions section to help visitors find their way to your location.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/cruz-n-cutz-barbershop-nampa

If building a simple website like this interests you, I'd be happy to discuss a flat fee for local businesses and answer any questions you may have. Please reply or give me a quick call to get started.

You can reach me at your convenience.
